scenarios.name: Code Assistant
scenarios.description: For coding, debugging, architecture, and tests.
scenarios.prompt_contract: Prioritize correctness, reproducibility, and explicit assumptions.

scenarios.name: Customer Service
scenarios.description: For customer support and response drafting.
scenarios.prompt_contract: Keep tone stable, empathetic, and policy-compliant.

scenarios.name: Content Writer
scenarios.description: For writing, storytelling, and marketing content.
scenarios.prompt_contract: Optimize for audience fit, voice consistency, and narrative clarity.

scenarios.name: Analyst
scenarios.description: For analysis, reports, and decision support.
scenarios.prompt_contract: Use evidence-driven structure with traceable reasoning.

scenarios.name: Educator
scenarios.description: For tutorials, teaching plans, and explanations.
scenarios.prompt_contract: Use progressive explanations and adaptive examples.

scenarios.name: General
scenarios.description: Fallback for mixed or unclear intents.
scenarios.prompt_contract: Balance clarity, completeness, and practical output.
constraints: Ask for missing inputs when needed

personalities.name: Professional
personalities.instruction: Write in a concise, precise, and execution-focused tone.

personalities.name: Friendly
personalities.instruction: Write in a warm, empathetic, and user-friendly tone.

personalities.name: Creative
personalities.instruction: Write with expressive language and fresh framing.

personalities.name: Analytical
personalities.instruction: Write with evidence, clear assumptions, and structured logic.

personalities.name: Teacher
personalities.instruction: Write with educational pacing and scaffolded explanations.

templates.name: LangGPT
templates.instruction: Emphasize modular capabilities, rules, and workflow.

templates.name: CO-STAR
templates.instruction: Emphasize context, audience, and response controls.

templates.name: XML
templates.instruction: Use explicit tags for machine readability and parsing.
